####
# FIRST ON THE BALLOT
---
| Hi ,

I've got great news to share: We're the FIRST to get our name on the primary ballot in June. I'm so proud of our team and grassroots supporters from across the district, but we can't stop now.

I'm not going to let down the almost **4,000 Iowans** who signed our petition and wanted a chance to send someone new to Washington. I'm not going to let the career politicians win.

We've been gaining momentum all summer, listening to everyday Iowans at dozens of GOP central committee meetings and over 25 county fairs. This campaign isn't about me, Washington needs to hear from YOU.

Consider donating [$1](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=a5ffe9785c&e=3cee88c8ab), [$5](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=409ad49d9d&e=3cee88c8ab), [$20](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=9a396ca3ed&e=3cee88c8ab), or maybe even [$50](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=595e848f9f&e=3cee88c8ab). After two decades running a small business, I know _every_ _single_ _dollar_ makes a difference. We can only do this with your support.

Take a look at this newsletter to see what we've been up to last month. I'll be keeping in touch.

Your neighbor,

---
| | NATIONWIDE RECOGNITION
---
| [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=60fe7cd17e&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
**RICHARDS SIGNS PLEDGE TO SUPPORT TERM LIMITS ON CONGRESS**
[US Term Limits](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=fa0ec52e73&e=3cee88c8ab): “Bret’s support of term limits shows that there are individuals who are willing to put self-interest aside to follow the will of the people. America needs a Congress that will be served by citizen legislators, not career politicians.”
| | RECENT COVERAGE
---
| [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=8aefdad6b0&e=3cee88c8ab)

**RICHARDS IS FIRST TO QUALIFY FOR BALLOT IN IOWA'S FOURTH**
IRWIN —** ** Republican Bret Richards is the first candidate in Iowa’s Fourth Congressional District to gather the necessary signatures to have his name ...
_CAFFEINATEDTHOUGHTS.COM_
| | [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=e82c116e2b&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
_[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=504e1cfd44&e=3cee88c8ab)
"The issues are complicated, but for 30 years, we've had them identified and how we can solve a lot of them, but still never do it. It goes back to the fact that [career politicians] only care about being re-elected."_

|

_[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=add17c71fa&e=3cee88c8ab)
"The board chairman of the Manning Regional Healthcare Center and businessman-educator from Irwin says he’ll bring a common-sense, regular-Iowa eye to Congress. What’s more, he says, he won’t stay too long in Washington"_

|
---
| | [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=0fed2e127e&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
_[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=91da20a691&e=3cee88c8ab)
"A lot of Iowans are tired of career politicians. The average citizen can be a citizen leader in Washington, D.C. and get more things done than the career politicians have in three or four decades." _

---
| | COOKOUTS, FAIRS, PARADES
---
|
---
| Every day people all across the district find ways to solve problems without bickering. Iowans can solve more problems at a cookout than Des Moines and Washington D.C. politicians can solve in a decade.

Bring a neighbor or two to one of our events when we are in your area. Hamburgers and hotdogs are on the grill.
---
|
---
---
| | BUILDING OUR NETWORK
---
|
---
|
---
---
| From Chickasaw to Harrison to Dickinson and Story, we've been taking our message on the road across the district's 39 counties and mobilizing grassroots Republicans at every county central committee.
---
|

| [Your Support](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=0085f4a4c8&e=3cee88c8ab "Your Support")
---
| We can't let this election be determined by D.C. or Des Moines insiders.
Even if you're unable to [donate](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=50ac13831d&e=3cee88c8ab "Your Contribution makes a difference."), we still need your help.

Would you put up a yard sign or barn sign? Want to serve as a county co-chair? Do you know others who might want to join our team?
Send us an email at [info@richardsforcongress.com ](mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com?subject=Count%20me%20in!%20)to lend a hand.

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: REMINDER: Join Presidential Candidate, Joe Sestak, in New York City on Thursday, September 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Will you join me in New York? I’m holding a reception at US Grid Company (USGRDCO) at 6pm on Thursday, September 5th. Please attend, with details below.
To RSVP and donate online please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603266/95163519/1298519058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=) \- and if you cannot attend, please contribute online [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603267/95163520/1298519058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=) or by check made out to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Please come to hear my message on how to win and to unite our nation!
Respectfully,
Joe

**_Jacob Worenklein, CEO, US Grid Company_** **_Cordially invites you to a Fundraiser Reception on Thursday, September 5, to support_
_Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak_** [Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603268/95163521/2128061837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=) wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, **former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak** has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and **“has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’”** The [editorial board of the Des Moines Register](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603269/95163522/-520002973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=) said, **“[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”**

[Vox called Joe](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603270/95163523/-1902359365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=) a **“maverick”** and **“an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.”**[National Review called him](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603271/95163524/-1828110372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=) **“the most interesting Democrat”** in the race.

Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe is an **experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years** , including in the **White House** as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly **2-to-1 Republican district where he was reelected without spending a dime on campaign ads**.

An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary. Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and [Plan for America](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603272/95163525/2016766251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=). Check out [JoeSestak.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603273/95163526/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=). **Thursday, September 5th from 6:00 p.m. - 7:30 p.m.** **at US Grid Company (USGRDCO)
1177 Avenue of the Americas - 5th Floor
New York, NY 10036
[between 45th and 46th Streets]** **Requested Contribution Levels:**
**Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250** **To RSVP or contribute for this event,[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9603274/95163527/1298519058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTlmMDZjZC0zNWNlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBEmhTeoI0WBNikDO6nihzwvmJIHQZnwNnGDlMFpR_k=)** **You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing** a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302. **Questions: Email [reception@joesestak.com](mailto:reception@joesestak.com?subject=September%205th%20Reception%20in%20NYC) or call 610-757-5051**

Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [https://iowastartingline.com/2019/07/29/the-peculiar-surprisingly-effective-campaign-of-joe-sestak/] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”
Vox called him [https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2019/8/13/20680106/joe-sestak-2020-presidential-campaign-policies-admiral-navy-specter-obama-medicare-public-option] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.” National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.
Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.
Joe [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/Joe.png] Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district.
An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary.
Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] . Check out JoeSestak.com [https://www.joesestak.com] .
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/LineW3Star.png]
Friday, September 6th, 6:30 p.m.
Margaret Kuo's Restaurant, 175 Lancaster Ave, Wayne, PA
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250 Backer: $100
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/LineW3Star.png]

payable to "Joe Sestak for President" to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302
Questions: Email reception@joesestak.com [reception@joesestak.com?subject=September%206th%20Reception%20in%20Wayne] or call 610-757-5051

name: Cory Booker
subject: The time to address climate change is now. Here's my plan:
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Climate change is not a distant threat -- **it 's happening now.** July 2019 was the hottest month on record for the planet, towns are seeing so-called "hundred-year" floods every few years, and millions around the world are fleeing climate change-related drought and famine. And I don't need to remind anyone currently being affected by Hurricane Dorian of the threat that increasingly destructive hurricanes pose to our coastal communities. The time for talk is over. **Today, I 'm releasing my plan to combat climate change and create a 100% carbon neutral economy, millions of good-paying jobs, and a guaranteed right to clean air, water, and soil for all Americans.** When I'm president, here's how we will do it:
1. **Directly invest over $3 trillion dollars by 2030 to build a 100% carbon neutral economy by 2045** , spurring economic activity, creating millions of jobs where they are needed most, and empowering communities to have control and ownership over their energy systems and local environments.
2. **Accelerate the end of fossil fuels** by immediately ending all fossil fuel subsidies, barring all new fossil fuel leases, banning fracking, and instituting a carbon fee and progressive climate dividend.
3. **Create the United States Environmental Justice Fund** , led by a White House Advisor for Environmental Justice, charged with coordinating the most ambitious-ever federal effort to advance environmental justice and invest in communities long left behind.

[**Add your name to join me in addressing the threat of climate change and building a 100% clean energy economy by 2045.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/climate-change-signon?source=em_pet_20190903_cb_20190903-pet-CB-climatechange-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Without deliberate, bold action, we risk an incredible human toll from disasters and health impacts, preventable national security threats, and trillions of dollars in economic losses. To end the real and growing threat of climate change and to create a more just country for everyone, we must act boldly to create a green and equitable future. That's exactly what I'll do as president. [**Will you stand with me in making the most sweeping investment to advance environmental justice?**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/climate-change-signon?source=em_pet_20190903_cb_20190903-pet-CB-climatechange-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The time to act is now. We can't afford not to. Cory **[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/climate-change-signon?source=em_pet_20190903_cb_20190903-pet-CB-climatechange-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b49/5fca0d19/723d8a8e/29198b95/3553312560/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b49/5fca0d19/723d8a8e/29198b94/3553312560/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b49/5fca0d19/723d8a8e/29198b93/3553312560/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b49/5fca0d19/723d8a8e/29198b92/3553312560/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

subject: They need to hear from you!
body:
| | Peter, Capitol Hill has been quiet the last month as legislators spent time in their districts on summer recess, but that’s all about to change. Congress returns to Capitol Hill this Monday, September 9, and it’s essential they hear from you on what issues you would like them to address in this session. We’ve made it extremely easy for you to send a custom message to your representative. name: Sara Gideon
subject: As a mom of three, photos like this one are honestly terrifying.
body:
Pictures inside.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df6/4bef7a87/68e6f522/287f1f8c/1279215139/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend,
Every day when we turn on the news, we're confronted by images like this:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df6/4bef7a87/68e6f522/287f1f83/1279215139/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MDMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/climate-survey?source=em190903-full")
_(Reuters)_
**The Amazon rainforest continues to burn, sea levels continue to rise, and weather patterns are changing at a rapid rate.**
Let me tell you, it's hard looking at photos like this. As a mom of three, I worry about the planet we're leaving behind for them. _Their_ generation will face incredible challenges because _my_ generation and the ones before it refused to take action.
It's not fair, and as a parent, it's terrifying. I don't feel that our current Congress is doing enough to address climate change and subsequent environmental issues. Do you feel the same way?
[**Take my short survey about climate change to let me know how you feel. Are you hopeful that our government will take the necessary steps to stop - or at least slow - this impending crisis?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802df6/4bef7a87/68e6f522/287f1f83/1279215139/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MDMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/climate-survey?source=em190903-full")
Your opinion here really does matter. Surveys like this one help me stay connected with my supporters on the most important issues of our campaign.
So thank you for participating. I look forward to reading what you have to say.
All my best,
Sara

Folks, it's here: the final stretch before the election. In two months, on **November 5th** , Mississippi will decide what kind of values we want guiding our state's future.

**But before I go on, I 'd like to say thanks to all of you.** With your help, we handily won our primary, and while our opponents took turns slinging mud at each other in their own primary run-off, we continued building a campaign for Mississippians.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump meets with FEMA officials at Camp David to prepare for Hurricane Dorian
body:
"Mr. Trump canceled a weekend visit to Poland to plan for the potentially catastrophic storm that could affect more than 20 million Americans." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d696a265a4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump meets with FEMA officials at Camp David to prepare for Hurricane Dorian**

“President Trump on Saturday met with FEMA officials at Camp David to discuss the response to Hurricane Dorian. Mr. Trump canceled a weekend visit to Poland to plan for the potentially catastrophic storm that could affect more than 20 million Americans,” Grace Segers reports for CBS News.

“White House press secretary Stephanie Grisham said the president has been briefed hourly on the storm.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=def1e05b02&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump, her father’s ambassador for women’s rights, is taking her campaign on the road for the second time, traveling to South America to urge nations to remove barriers to economic empowerment for women,” Paul Bedard writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e34c943ae&e=3ee4985eea). Ms. Trump will visit Colombia, Argentina, and Paraguay to discuss the Administration’s Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or W-GDP.
---
|
---
| “A major headline from the Department of Justice's (DOJ) latest inspector general report is that fired FBI Director James Comey mishandled classified information. But you’d never know it from most of the day-after media reporting on the historic findings,” John Solomon writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3da6695320&e=3ee4985eea). “The internal DOJ watchdog documented, irrefutably, that Comey leaked the contents of a classified memo to his legal team, first orally and then by providing a copy of the document. Some of the memo’s content was then leaked to a media organization by one of his lawyers.”
---
|
---
| If you took an end-of-summer road trip this Labor Day, you may have found yourself spending less on fuel, Kenneth Kiesnoski writes for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d15a996c08&e=3ee4985eea). “Today’s average price of just more than $2.58 per gallon is 25 cents cheaper than during the Labor Day weekend last year, when it was $2.83, and 5 cents cheaper than the same period in 2017 ($2.63).”
---
|
---
| “Small and rural communities often depend on trade and export markets to keep the lights on and the doors open at their farms and businesses. The new North American trade deal – the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) – is a critical step to improving access to two of our most important markets: Canada and Mexico,” Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) writes in the [_Quad-City Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f524f15ed5&e=3ee4985eea). “If ratified by Congress, USMCA would be a boon for Iowa and the entire country. The importance of trade with our North American neighbors can’t be understated.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=105a6111ef&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a55da798d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d7ff529f36)
---

Some of the memo’s content was then leaked to a media organization by one of his lawyers.” | | If you took an end-of-summer road trip this Labor Day, you may have found yourself spending less on fuel, Kenneth Kiesnoski writes for . “Today’s average price of just more than $2.58 per gallon is 25 cents cheaper than during the Labor Day weekend last year, when it was $2.83, and 5 cents cheaper than the same period in 2017 ($2.63).” | | “Small and rural communities often depend on trade and export markets to keep the lights on and the doors open at their farms and businesses. The new North American trade deal – the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) – is a critical step to improving access to two of our most important markets: Canada and Mexico,” Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) writes in the . “If ratified by Congress, USMCA would be a boon for Iowa and the entire country. The importance of trade with our North American neighbors can’t be understated.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

| The next debate is just over a week away and we're full speed ahead in debate prep. Cory asked us to reach out again to make sure your input makes it into the debate prep materials. So, team, **[can you let Cory know what issues matter the most to you -- and any advice you have for him as he prepares for the third debate? Here's a link to submit:](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190903_BHQ_20190903-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190903_BHQ_20190903-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The final DNC debate lineup is set: Amy Klobuchar, Cory Booker, Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris, Andrew Yang, Beto O'Rourke, and Julian Castro. As a top supporter, your input really matters to Cory. **[Will you take our debate stage survey before midnight tonight? We'll share your thoughts with Cory tomorrow on what issues he should bring to the stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190903_BHQ_20190903-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,

name: Jon, Team de Blasio
subject: A personal take on universal pre-K
body:
We spent more money on a new backpack than we spent on an entire year of early learning.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aeff/1744860700/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=719_org_em_lb")
Friend,
Backpack: check. Notebook: check. Pencils: check.****
Extra year of high-quality early childhood education: check.
My five year old, Elyse, starts Kindergarten tomorrow. She's a little nervous about finally going to "the big kids' school," but one thing her mom and I feel confident about: she's prepared. Thanks to Mayor de Blasio's Universal Pre-K (UPK) program, she's already had an entire year of quality, full-day education under her belt.
The most incredible part is that it was completely free. Yes, we literally spent more money on her new backpack than we spent on an entire year of early learning. And that's not just true for us, it's true for every family in New York City.
**[If you're a parent with a kid in the UPK system or a kid who finished pre-school elsewhere, share your story of what Universal Pre-K has meant for your family.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aeff/1744860700/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=719_org_em_lb")**
I've been working on progressive political campaigns for over two decades, and one of the things I've learned is that voters can be pretty cynical. Many have lost faith in the idea that the government is actually on their side.
It's hard to blame them. After the financial collapse, the government bailed out the banks, but barely lifted a finger to help families facing foreclosure or drowning in student debt.
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aeff/1744860700/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=719_org_em_lb")
For me, Universal Pre-K is personal because of what it means for my own kids. But it's bigger than that. It's a reminder that when the government is actually on the side of the people, it can make a huge difference in their lives.
Not only does UPK mean saving roughly $10,000 on average for every family with a four-year-old child, but it also means giving every kid a fair start in life.
**[What's your UPK or pre-Kindergarten story? Click here to share what early education has meant for your family.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aeff/1744860700/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=719_org_em_lb")**
This is one of the reasons I joined Mayor de Blasio's campaign. When he talks about making big changes that really make a difference for everyday people, it's not just words. It's what he's been able to accomplish here in New York City.
The other night at bedtime, I asked Elyse what she wants to be when she grows up. She's still deciding between an artist, a shopkeeper, a writer, a builder, a doctor and, yes, a president. When kids get the type of early education they have in New York City, parents can tell their children "you can be anything you want" -- and actually mean it.
Let's continue the fight to expand Universal Pre-K,
Jon Green
Political Director
de Blasio 2020
P.S. I'd be a bad parent if I wrote this entire email and didn't also put in a quick word for my adorable three-year-old son, Theo. I asked him what he wants to be when he grows up too and he said "a poopyhead." He'll start UPK next September and I'm hoping his teachers will, um, expand his horizons a little. If you don't have a story, but you know someone who does, will you forward them this email and ask them to **_[share](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aeff/1744860700/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=719_org_em_lb")_** their story?
PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aefe/1744860700/VEsA/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dfc/1630b3eb/516a473b/5f54aefd/1744860700/VEsB/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: A direct attack on the work we did in Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Last week, the Trump administration announced a proposal to roll back Obama-era regulations on methane emissions--the second largest contributor to climate change. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714fa/691c9bd/6e7c78e1/11a7bc39/4033950233/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Last week, the Trump Administration announced a proposal to roll back Obama-era regulations on methane emissions--the second largest contributor to climate change.

Team, I'm livid. Here's why:

When I was governor, **Colorado enacted the first statewide methane regulations in the country** , with input from all sorts of people. Our rules became a model for the nation--a huge step forward in the fight against climate change.

**Now, Donald Trump 's EPA is taking direct action that threatens to undermine climate progress in Colorado and across the country.** [**_We need your help to push back. Add your voice to this fight now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714fa/691c9bd/6e7c78e1/11a7bc36/4033950233/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stand-up-for-climate-progress?source=em_climatepet20190903")

Friend, this proposal by Trump's EPA is so extreme that even the big oil and gas companies it's meant to help think it's a bad idea.

**Trump will only get away with this as long as the Republican Senate lets him --and so far, Cory Gardner and Mitch McConnell have left his power unchecked.**

It's only getting harder and harder to take--and maintain--the necessary steps to combat climate change. We all breathe the same air, and we _must_ step up as a country to protect it. Unlike Cory Gardner, I've brought people together to take real action against climate change, and I plan to continue to do so in the Senate.

[**_If you believe Donald Trump and his administration need to keep their hands off essential environmental regulations and take climate change seriously, sign our petition now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714fa/691c9bd/6e7c78e1/11a7bc36/4033950233/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stand-up-for-climate-progress?source=em_climatepet20190903") We must keep fighting--thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_pet_20190903_JH_20190903-pet-JH-climatepet-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Tina Smith
subject: [Signature Needed] Tell Congress to make affordable childcare a TOP priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Did you know in 28 states and D.C. childcare costs more than a year of public college? Join me in demanding Congress make childcare more affordable.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190903childcare1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -

Did you know in 28 states and D.C. childcare costs more than a year of public college? And yes, Minnesota is on the list.

The cost of childcare today is through the roof, which means parents are having to choose between financial security or finding care for their young ones. Or for a lot of young adults, whether to have kids at all.

We need to change the conversation on childcare to help our country's future, which is why I'm teaming up with a group of legislators and progressive groups to demand Congress take action. **But we need your voice too to make this a national priority.**

**[Friend, I'm counting on you to be one of the voices we need telling Congress to take action on making childcare affordable for working families. Add your name right now>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41689/c1f7015/67d96317/11462e13/2812461523/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/smith/?source=em190903childcare1-b&recurring=auto")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41689/c1f7015/67d96317/11462e13/2812461523/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/smith/?source=em190903childcare1-b&recurring=auto")** There is so much that Congress can do to make affordable childcare a reality for working families across the country.

This means expanding access to affordable preschool and pre-K, funding a tax relief to reimburse the cost of childcare and paid family leave, and making sure childcare workers are paid a living wage.

**There are too many families in Minnesota and our country who are struggling to find affordable, quality childcare. It's up to Congress to make a difference.**

**[Let's lift up our voices for families. Will you join me in urging Congress to make affordable childcare a priority when session reconvenes?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41689/c1f7015/67d96317/11462e13/2812461523/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/smith/?source=em190903childcare1-b&recurring=auto")**

Together, we can do this,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190903childcare1-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

# **President Trump’s message on Hurricane Dorian**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4bf3d1a761&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **As Hurricane Dorian** affects America’s southeast coast this week, President Donald J. Trump is making the safety of all residents in its path his Administration’s top priority.

**“The safety** of the American people must always come first,” the President said this weekend. “My staff and I receive frequent updates to ensure that we are fully prepared. And we are fully prepared.”

**At FEMA headquarters** on Sunday, Acting FEMA Administrator Pete Gaynor briefed President Trump on the approaching storm and its anticipated impact. Meetings such as these ensure that Federal officials—including the President himself—are working in close coordination with local authorities in Florida, Georgia, South Carolina, and North Carolina.

**President Trump** also emphasized the importance of residents heeding warnings from state and local leaders to prepare and evacuate as needed.

**All told,** a team of 4,000 strong is assisting in hurricane response efforts. These professionals and volunteers span 27 Federal departments and agencies, the Red Cross, and the National Voluntary Organizations Active in Disaster. Even with all these helping hands, nothing is more important for saving lives than taking precautions in advance.

**“Don't tough it out.** Get out,” Acting FEMA Administrator Gaynor says. “Make the smart choice today, because the clock is ticking.”

**Life-threatening storm** surge and high winds are expected from Florida up to the Carolinas over the next few days. Even if there is no direct landfall, Hurricane Dorian is likely to cause significant damage along the East Coast. These effects could be felt hundreds of miles—or more—from the center of the storm.

**To Americans** in these areas: Please stay safe and be prepared to evacuate if you haven’t already. Fill the gas tank, know the evacuation zones and routes, and stock your vehicle with enough emergency supplies to last at least several days.

**“Americans are strong** , determined, and resilient, and we will support each other. And we will work very hard to minimize whatever the effect of what’s coming at us,” President Trump said.

[President Trump: “I ask everyone in Hurricane Dorian’s path to heed all warnings.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=263c921bca&e=3ee4985eea)

**Stay prepared:** [Up-to-date FEMA resources and information on Hurricane Dorian](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b6d8e64f2&e=3ee4985eea)

[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCOk45eDtJG05f5B9vVuvykk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190903_fr&n=1) We don’t need to tell you about Trump’s hypocrisy with golf — the man plays just about every chance he can get. But his latest trip to the links is just another example of how little he actually cares about his duties as President of the United States. **Let’s start from the top.** First, President Trump canceled his trip to Poland, which was meant to mark the start of the Second World War. He claimed that he needed to stay in Washington to monitor Hurricane Dorian as it barrelled toward Puerto Rico and Florida this weekend. Then we find out that _President Trump decided to play golf._ What makes it even worse is that _**he went to his own golf course, using our government's money to enrich himself.**_ **Why does this matter?** It matters because in times of crisis, folks look to their leaders for hope, leadership, and solutions. _They need to know they are focused on helping them through these difficult times, and doing everything in their power to bring the whole authority of government to respond_. **_This is something President Trump has time and again refused to do._** Our country deserves better, and in 2020 we’re going to show folks from Anchorage to Bangor, from Des Moines to Manchester, from San Francisco to Tallahassee, and everywhere in between what a real leader looks like. And we’re confident that when people see it, **Donald Trump will have a lot more time to play golf.** Thanks for being a part of this fight with us. — Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCOk45eDtJG05f5B9vVuvykk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190903_fr&n=2)
